title: NASA Chandra X-ray Observatory
description: A NASA source card about Chandra and high-energy astronomy.
license: Public Domain / NASA Media Usage Guidelines

pages.text: NASA Chandra resources introduce X-ray astronomy and evidence from hot gas, supernova remnants, neutron stars, black holes, and galaxy clusters.
Use this source to show why scientists observe the universe in wavelengths human eyes cannot see.
NASA materials are generally public domain as U.S. government work, but some images, partner resources, insignia, and logos have separate usage rules. Check item-level rights.
